channel.title: [Guide] How to Create a React Theme
channel.description:
Hi there! :wave:
The **guide** that @luisherranz and @David shared during their workshop "How to Create a React Theme in 30 Minutes" at WordCamp Sevilla 2019 is now available **in English**.
However, please note that some explanations and context they gave during the workshop might be missing. Feel free to ask if you have questions. :)
https://frontity.org/blog/how-to-create-a-react-theme-in-30-minutes/
The full workshop (in Spanish) can also be watched on [WordPress TV](https://wordpress.tv/2019/10/18/david-arenas-luis-herranz-crea-un-tema-con-react-en-menos-de-30-minutos/) and [YouTube](https://youtu.be/gOwrldmBLrQ).

item.title: [Guide] How to Create a React Theme
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Thanks @Reyes!

Read full topic
item.source: [Guide] How to Create a React Theme

item.title: [Guide] How to Create a React Theme
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi there!

The guide that @luisherranz and @David shared during their workshop “How to Create a React Theme in 30 Minutes” at WordCamp Sevilla 2019 is now available in English.

However, please note that some explanations and context they gave during the workshop might be missing. Feel free to ask if you have questions.

Frontity – 27 Feb 20

How to Create a React WordPress Theme in 30 Minutes

An English version of the guide that Luis and David shared during their workshop "How to Create a React WordPress Theme" at WordCamp Sevilla 2019.

The full workshop (in Spanish) can also be watched on WordPress TV and YouTube.

Read full topic
item.source: [Guide] How to Create a React Theme
